bard.reason: Makes your inspiring music last longer — more help for your whole party.
Lets you cast from a safer distance instead of standing next to danger.

cleric.reason: Your healing spells restore noticeably more HP — great for keeping allies up.
Grants a signature divine power tied to your deity.

druid.reason: A loyal animal that fights beside you — fun and powerful at low levels.
Cast your spells from farther away, keeping you out of harm's reach.

fighter.reason: A big, heavy swing for extra damage — simple and satisfying.
Rush across the battlefield and hit something in one move.

ranger.reason: Fire two arrows at your prey in a single action.
A loyal animal ally that hunts alongside you.

rogue.reason: React to dodge an incoming attack — a great low-level lifesaver.
Attack with two weapons so the second hit catches foes off guard.

witch.reason: Brew a few helpful potions each day for you and your friends.
Extend your spells' range so you can hex from safety.

wizard.reason: A little magical companion that helps with your spellcasting.
Push your spells' range out so you can stay behind the front line.

dwarf.reason: Wield classic dwarven weapons like the war axe with skill.
Move easily over rubble and rocky ground others struggle with.

elf.reason: A free at-will cantrip — handy magic for any elf.
Train with iconic elven bows and blades.

gnome.reason: A free fey cantrip to sprinkle a little magic into your day.
Gain a small companion to help you out.

goblin.reason: Use fun goblin weapons like the dogslicer.
Love fire? Your fire effects hit harder.

halfling.reason: Once a day, reroll a bad result — pure clutch insurance.
Train with slings and other classic halfling arms.

human.reason: An extra class feat at level 1 — more of what makes your class fun.
Train in two more skills, making you more well-rounded.

leshy.reason: A handy at-will ranged attack that can hamper enemies.
Extra training in Nature and Stealth, plus herbalism know-how.

orc.reason: Once a day, survive a hit that would drop you — stay in the fight.
Swing mighty orc weapons like the greataxe.
